response.justification: Bogdan is a strong software engineer with proven leadership and solid DevOps/platform experience, but lacks the critical technical qualifications for this role. He has only 1-2 years of C++ experience versus the non-negotiable 8-year minimum requirement, and his infrastructure expertise is primarily application-level distributed systems rather than low-level compute platform architecture. His recent trajectory focuses on full-stack development and AI tooling, not the core systems programming and platform infrastructure specialization this role demands.
strengths: Demonstrates strong software craftsmanship principles (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and mentorship culture
Proven ability to architect and launch complex distributed platforms (GISCollective, Dunnhumby's microservices infrastructure, Optilyz)
Leadership progression to Staff-level roles with experience organizing knowledge-sharing initiatives
concerns: Critical gap: only ~1-2 years of C++ experience; position requires 8 years as non-negotiable minimum
Infrastructure experience skews toward application-layer services and DevOps tooling, not compute platform or systems-level architecture
Career trajectory emphasizes full-stack web/backend development and tooling over specialized systems programming or cloud compute specialization
